Description: SecureBase read-only cross-account IAM role for compliance scanning. Deploy this template in your AWS account to grant SecureBase read-only access for HIPAA, SOC2, FedRAMP, and CIS assessments.

ExternalId.Description: The ExternalId generated by SecureBase during the Cloud Connection setup wizard. Required to prevent the confused deputy problem.

SecureBasePrincipalArn.Description: The ARN of the SecureBase IAM principal that will assume this role (provided in the Cloud Connection setup wizard).

RoleArn.Description: ARN of the SecureBaseReadOnlyRole — paste this into the SecureBase Cloud Connection verify step.
